glue_benchmark.description: 9 diverse NLU tasks: sentiment, entailment, similarity, etc.

squad_dataset.name: SQuAD Reading Comprehension
squad_dataset.description: 100K questions over Wikipedia passages, human & machine answers

climate_data.name: Climate & Weather Dataset
climate_data.description: Monthly global averages: temperature, CO2, solar activity, 1850-2024

astronomical_objects.name: Astronomical Objects Catalog
